<h1 align="center">👋 Hi, I'm Prateek Purohit</h1>

- 🔭 I'm currently working on **Backend Development and API Security.**
- 🌱 I'm currently learning **AWS, CyberSecurity and DevOps.**
- 💬 Feel free to reach out for collaborations or discussions!
- 😄 Pronouns: **he/him/his**
- 📫 How to reach me: **[Email](mailto:contact@prateekpurohit.tech)** / **[LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/prateek-purohit-3a96a728a)** / **[Website](https://www.prateekpurohit.tech)**
- ⚡ Fun fact: **I'm still discovering new things about myself and tech every day**
